title: चारधाम स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री चारधाम स्तोत्रम् ॥

बदरीनाथं नमामि देवं हिमालयवासिनम्।
नरनारायणं शान्तं बदरीधामनायकम्॥ १॥

द्वारकानाथमीशानं रणछोड़राजमव्ययम्।
गोमतीतीरसंस्थानं कृष्णं वन्दे जगद्गुरुम्॥ २॥

जगन्नाथं पुरीक्षेत्रे सबलभद्रसुभद्रायुतम्।
महाप्रसाददातारं नीलाचलनिवासिनम्॥ ३॥

रामेश्वरं सेतुबन्धे ज्योतिर्लिंगं महाप्रभुम्।
रामसेतुसमीपस्थं शिवं प्रणमतां शुभम्॥ ४॥

चारधामसमायुक्तं भारतक्षेत्रपावनम्।
य इदं पठते नित्यं चतुर्धामफलं लभेत्॥ ५॥

॥ इति श्री चारधाम स्तोत्रम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
benefits: Sacred Char Dham Stotram for devotion and spiritual growth
Invokes blessings of Vishnu in all forms
Removes sins and bestows spiritual merit
Ideal for Vishnu festivals and daily worship
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Vishnu, Char Dham Stotram (चारधाम स्तोत्रम्) stands as a devotional hymn of praise. This revered text originates from Purana Tradition. Devotees recite this prayer to grant divine protection and auspiciousness and invoke blessings of Vishnu in all forms. It is also said to remove sins and bestow spiritual merit. This prayer is traditionally recited on Thursday (Guruvar) and Monday (Somvar) and during Devuthani Ekadashi and Rath Yatra to invoke divine grace. With 5 verses and a reading time of about 3 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Char Dham Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Char Dham Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Vishnu devotion.
